purpose: Master list of ALL ministries/departments India's government publishes under -- derived from the program's own PIB register (122,141 releases, 2017-2026): every distinct publishing entity with its release count (activity measure) and first/last dates. The 16 entities already swept in the site-verified incentive catalog are flagged CATALOGED; extending the company-facing-incentive sweep to the remaining entities is the stated NEXT STEP.
